name: White
description: White is the president and manager of the BW Agency, a company that has a large supply of Pokémon actors that can be used for commercials, plays, movies, and stunts. Whenever her company's reputation is put on the line, she will do anything to prevent its name from being ruined. name: Yajirou Shimogamo
description: Yajirou is a very passive character. The frog-tanuki spends the majority of his life quietly listening to the story of any passerby who wishes to confess, acting as a listening ear amongst the community. This also applies to his brother, Yasaburou, who often drops by his well to talk. Although Yajirou never tries to actively contribute to his family, he is still loyal and loving of them. (Source: Uchouten Kazoku Wiki)

name: Yomi Takanashi
description: __Height__: 160 cm Yomi is a gentle, good-natured girl who speaks politely and calmly; she is very mature for her age. Her name literally means "No hawks, where little birds play." She is supposedly a member of a well-to-do family, staying for some time in Germany before moving to Mato's neighborhood. name: Yoru
description: He's an enigmatic individual affiliated with the unnamed organization, in which Yomi is believed to hold a leadership position.

name: Yoshio Kobayashi
description: A boy retrieved from the Unidentifiable Haze that possesses an immortal body. Because he knows the origins of his immortality involved hurting many people, he harbors a strong desire to commit suicide. He is often rebellious, uncooperative, and rude.

name: Yukine Miyazawa
description: Yukine is a second year student who hangs around in the library's reference room during lunchtime. She takes care of many newcomers from other schools who also happen to be delinquents - in particular, people who knew her brother. She's very kind, and avails [Tomoya](https://anilist.co/character/4606) and [Youhei](https://anilist.co/character/4610) an instruction book for magical spells for them to try. ~!Yukine is actually involved deeply with the story relating to the delinquents. name: Yuriko Nishinotouin
description: A third-year student, member of the student council, and president of the Tradition Culture Research Society. She ends up challenging Yumeko to an original gambling match.

name: Zeno
description: Grand Zeno (全王 Zen’ō, lit. "King of All"), the Omni-King, is the supreme ruler of all the Multiverse, and its by far most powerful being. ~!Since the events of the "Future" Trunks Saga, Zeno co-rules jointly with his future counterpart.!~ (Source: https://dragonball.fandom.com)

name: Canada

name: Chikan Otoko
description: The protagonist of Chikan Otoko. Molester man is a pet otaku with no friends. One night on his way back home, he is mistaken as a stalker of Miss Understanding.

name: Claire Thomas
description: Claire Thomas is Emily's twin sister where they are both American exchange students at Urama High School, and both are the top junior beach volleyball players in the world. Emily makes up one half of Team Eclair. She quickly becomes close with Haruka because of the similarity of their personalities and they can often be seen together if Kanata is not around.
